headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

site_brief.audience: buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents
site_brief.goal: Create a frequently refreshed editorial blog homepage with a lead analysis, short posts, source cards, and a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching makes repeated agent work cheaper and better.
site_brief.title: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: A refreshed editorial brief for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents — covering Gemini’s expansion into computer use, Grok’s private beta momentum, Siri’s generational upgrade, and the broader shift toward assistants that act, not just chat. We position Super as the sharper alternative for repeated computer-use workflows through its reusable computer-use cache.
